understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to place all selectable pieces onto goal tiles (marked '+') simultaneously by moving them through a grid with obstacles.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Clicking on a piece selects it; clicking on an adjacent empty grid cell moves the selected piece there if the path is not blocked. Obstacles block movement. Repeatedly clicking a blocked tile depletes the step budget without moving the piece.
